title: Warm American Cabbage Pasta
description: A charred, gooey solo dinner of savoy cabbage and pasta, finished with a creamy cheese emulsion for a comforting American twist.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Add the sliced cabbage and sauté until the edges begin to brown, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Pour in the vegetable broth, cover, and simmer until the cabbage is tender, about 8 minutes.
While the cabbage cooks, boil the pasta in salted water until al dente, about 10 minutes, then drain.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet with cabbage, tossing to combine and develop a slight char on the pasta.
Stir in the grated parmesan, salt, pepper, and oregano, letting the cheese melt into a creamy emulsion.
Serve immediately, garnished with lemon zest if desired, for a warm, gooey solo dinner.
